description: Rewrite config.py for multi-admin support and excel_export.py to include student number column. Update deploy.sh to support ADMIN_IDS.
steps: - Replace single ADMIN_ID with ADMIN_IDS as a list of ints parsed from comma-separated .env value (e.g. ADMIN_IDS=123456,789012)
- Keep backward compatibility: if ADMIN_IDS not set, fall back to ADMIN_ID env var (single value)
- Headers become: #, Raqam, Ism, Familiya, Ball, Foiz, Javoblar
- Show student_number from each student record (or '-' if None)
- Change the prompt from 'Admin Telegram ID' to 'Admin Telegram ID(s) (vergul bilan ajrating)'
- Write ADMIN_IDS instead of ADMIN_ID to .env file
- Keep the variable name as ADMIN_IDS in .env
acceptance_criteria: config.py exports ADMIN_IDS as a list of integers
config.py gracefully handles: single ID, comma-separated IDs, empty/missing value
excel_export.py generates xlsx with student number column
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/ufqbot && python -c "from test_grader_bot.config import ADMIN_IDS; assert isinstance(ADMIN_IDS, list); print('Config OK:', ADMIN_IDS)"

cd /projects/sandbox/ufqbot && python -c "from test_grader_bot.excel_export import generate_results_excel; buf = generate_results_excel([{'name':'Ali','surname':'V','score':5,'total':10,'answers':['A','B'],'student_number':3}]); print('Excel OK, size:', len(buf.getvalue()))"
findings: Also updated bot.py to import ADMIN_IDS (list) instead of ADMIN_ID (int) and changed the admin check to use 'in' operator. All verification passed. The __pycache__ directory was not committed.
